message:
bd-ml2r.12.1: add FNX-off baseline snapshot and invariant tests

Adds comprehensive test suite for verifying FNX-off mode baseline invariants:
- Determinism: verifies output hash stability across 5 runs
- Structural: node/edge count consistency
- Layout bounds: finite and non-negative validation
- Position invariants: all nodes within layout bounds
- Warning stability: consistent warning count across runs
- Blessed baselines: CI-enforceable hash regression detection (BLESS_BASELINE=1)
- Evidence logging: structured JSON output for QA integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
